crossEventQuestion: When should AI and cloud infrastructure scale while operating expense remains constrained?
observation: The reviewed 2023 and 2024 events scale infrastructure against demand while preserving explicit cost discipline.
invariant: Scale capacity when customer demand and urgency are observable, while constraining operating expense and monitoring infrastructure economics.
boundaryConditions: Demand, capacity urgency, and infrastructure economics must remain observable.
unresolvedConflicts: The bounded public event set contains no reviewed opposite action under the same AI capacity and cost conditions.

decisionAxis.decisionQuestion: When should capacity scale within operating-cost constraints?

conditions: Customer demand and material AI capacity requirements remain observable.

conditionDelta: No reviewed opposite-condition AI capacity event is available in the bounded public evidence set.
actionDelta: Capacity deferral is retained as a reversal path if demand, urgency, or economics weaken.
